option_semantics.architecture: named source layout profile when a scaffold has one
option_semantics.artifacts: files and tool configs emitted by the scaffold
option_semantics.capabilities: selected optional capabilities that have generated code and validation support
option_semantics.cli_framework: CLI parser/framework selected by a CLI scaffold
option_semantics.command_root: where framework-native command adapter files belong
option_semantics.composition: system-only metadata for discovering contained project manifests
option_semantics.entrypoint: process entrypoint for the generated project
option_semantics.execution_models: how generated code is meant to execute
option_semantics.lifecycle: project-local commands that agents and humans can run to install, test, and check the scaffold
option_semantics.provider_targets: infrastructure providers targeted by generated IaC or platform config
option_semantics.repo_layout: how generated projects are arranged in the repository
option_semantics.runtime_platforms: where generated runtime artifacts are meant to run
option_semantics.src_root_files: files expected directly under src/ for source-root hygiene
